sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63810" key="loigolamph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοιγολαμπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n63810.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">balefully gleaming</tr_>, cj. for <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">λογο</itype>- in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.173.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
